title: Surat、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Surat、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Surat是Gujarat的一个城市，人口约6,100,000。The diamond cutting and polishing capital of the world, also a major textile hub with a rapidly growing economy and infrastructure.
